# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        text(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Shell command to run for build')
        text(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'echo "No test script specified"', description: 'Shell command to run for tests')
        text(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy step specified"', description: 'Shell command to run for deployment')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                sh "${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
            }
        }
    }
}
